placements.overview:
Sat Priya Group of Institutions is a private institute, established in 2007 in Rohtak, Haryana. Sat Priya Group of Institutions is approved by AICTE and PCI and offers a total of 15 courses at UG and PG levels in 5 specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Transportation Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and BCA in Full Time mode. Sat Priya Group of Institutions fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 72,000 to 1,72,000. Sat Priya Group of Institutions has an annual seat intake of 591 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Teaching & Education. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

At the UG and PG levels, Sat Priya Group of Institutions offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The Sat Priya Group of Institutions course fee ranges between INR 72,000 to 1,72,000.

A hallmark of this institute is an all-inclusive learning experience to its students through extracurricular activities as well as resources such as Auditorium, Cafeteria, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus.

reviews_list.review_title: It is an average college for local students.

review_content.Placements: I'm a B.Sc. Medical student at University College Benra (Batch 2027). Around 40–50% of students go for placements, while others prefer higher studies. Packages range from 1.8–5 LPA, averaging 2.5–3 LPA. Companies like Dr. Lal PathLabs and Fortis Healthcare visit for internships and roles like lab technician, medical sales representative, and clinical research assistant. About 50–60% get internships. Some through college, others by networking. A friend of mine even interns at a Chandigarh research lab. The college offers a good base, and with the right effort, you can shape your path in medical sciences or research.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good faculty members, but it doesn't provide transport facilities.

review_content.Placements: According to our seniors, placements are not good as it is a government college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are average. The library is also average. No hostels are provided. There is no canteen or cafe in our college. There is no Wi-Fi for students.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are good and cooperative. All faculty members are qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is good. MST, or mid-term exams, are tough and also conducted systematically. They do not provide practical knowledge of subjects.

reviews_list.review_title: This is a good college though. Decent college for just a degree Certificate in less expense.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements happening in this college. If there are companies that visit the college to hire, they are just product-selling companies. And the salary is also very low, like Rs 10–12k per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good. There is no Wi-Fi. The college provides a good library. well-ventilated rooms. There is no hostel facility. There is a private canteen on the college campus itself. There is a large field for cricket and other sports. The quality provided in the canteen is quite good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are decent. They are highly qualified. As it is a government college, the curriculum makes the students industry-ready as it is directly registered under Punjabi University, Patiala. Semester exams were not that difficult and also not that easy. They were moderate.

individual_reviews.title: Best class organization and also good lab facilities.

content.Placements: Actually, as I am only in my 2nd year, I don't know much about placements, but as our faculty said, there are good companies that arrive to recruit students, and also the highest package was 600,000 and the lowest was 250,000. Actually, there is an internship program for students in the 4th year of the course. The top roles are druggist, quality assurance department, etc.

It also has a digital library in which we can use computers for educational purposes. Our classrooms are well-organized and also have much space to interact. Currently, our college only has hostel facilities for girls. For boys, they should join the nearby private hostels. I am currently living in a private hostel, which is a very short distance from the college. The canteen in our college is hygienic, and the food is top-notch. Various sports and games are conducted in our college, and various tournaments are held to enhance the ability of the students.

review_summary.college_name: KK Modi University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A review from a student.

content.Placements: The average package for our college is around 8 LPA, and the highest package goes to 12 LPA. According to me, I see more than 70 to 80% of my seniors got placements. The placements in companies such as Colorbar, Indofil Industries, Godfrey Philips India Ltd, and many more in every field.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is hi-tech and totally updated with safety checks. The college environment is too friendly. I don't have any experience of hostel life. For the sports and games, we have pool table, table tennis, volleyball field, badminton field, and many things are under construction.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Data Analytics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: KKMU life and overview.

content.Placements: I am 2023 batch. I am doing BCA in Data Analytics from KK Modi University. I have learned about programming languages, OOPS, Algorithms, My SQL, etc. Around 28 students are there in batch 2023, and I will complete my degree in 2026, and we are going for internships also in next 5th semester.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our university is very good compared to the other colleges. Only from a distance we can see the difference between our university and other colleges regarding infrastructure. All the things are there like Wi-Fi, tables, cafeteria, sports, games, and many more.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The thing that summarizes my college review would be the college like never before.

content.Placements: Well, I had no information about the same thing since I am not away and I had not talked to others about the same thing. I definitely mention the moment I get it. The recruiting companies were the based ones the high wheel maximum package was around 5 LPA, and I am not aware of the other ones my college comes under tier 3 categories. I think such things won't be the point to consider like the top recruiting companies and basically, every student got the internships and industrial experience.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, we had great and wonderful infrastructure. Wi-Fi was available, and we had a dedicated life for computer students. We had a classroom suitable for students up to 30. There was a library and tables were installed over there.

individual_reviews.title: A Day in My College Life.

content.Placements: The highest average package that our university has provided is above 18 Lacs and the lowest package is about 2 to 5 Lacs. The top recruiting companies for our course are Apply Legal and other CA firms. Almost all the students got the internship programme.
content.Infrastructure: The hostels provided by our college are very clean and hygienic and the location is very good. As all the other shops are easily accessible from that location and it’s safe. Measures and canteen facilities are also available for sports and games. The quality of the food is also good.

individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The B.Com batch we have to do internship in CA firm because of the subject and the highest package the university provided is above 18 lakh and top recruiting companies are CA firms like Apply Legal, Motilal Oswal. All the students almost get the internship programme.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is pretty good and comfortable too and also the arrangements are good. We receive good facilities but we have food issues because mess food is not that good. Also, we face several issues with food. The canteen is good and also we have the pool, carrom, TT, and many types of games available.

admission_overview.college_name: KK Modi University Course Admission 2026: Eligibility, Selection, Application Process, Fee

admission_overview.title: KK Modi University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: KK Modi University admission is currently open. The university offers admission to candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. The university conducts KKMU Admission Test to shortlist candidates for specific courses. KKMU offers courses, such as BTech (CS) certification, BBA, MCA, MBA, MTech etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate, diploma and PG diploma courses. To get admission to KK Modi University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The university offers more than 15 courses (including specialisations) in various streams such as Engineering, Design, Management, Commerce etc. The application process at KK Modi University is conducted online.

eligibility_selection.title: KK Modi University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: KK Modi University admissions are based on entrance exam scores. The requirement of entrance exam varies with the course. Aspirants without a score in national or state-level entrance tests can appear for KKMU Admission Test. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular KK Modi University courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with a 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category) with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with Chemistry/ Biology/ Technical vocational subjects

KKMU Admission Test or Personal Interview/MAT/CAT/XAT/CMAT/ATMA/NMAT

courses_table.eligibility: Bachelor's Degree or equivalent or MSc with a 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category)
courses_table.selection_criteria: KKMU Admission Test, GDPI/any national or state-level test

paragraphs: KK Modi University admission processincludes registration and candidates need to sit and appear for the entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat at KK Modi University:
STEP 1: KK Modi University Application Process

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Aspirants can also visit the admission cell to apply for the desired course at KK Modi University. Candidates need to pay INR 380 to apply for a course.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds & Provisional Admission

Students are selected based on an entrance exam, GDPI. However, candidates also have to pay an application fee as per respective courses. If selected, admission are offered provisionally, and the applicant needs to deposit an amount of INR 10,000 through DD/Online.
STEP 3:Admission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, aspirants need to report at the campus and pay theKK Modi University feesto confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBA course admission at KK Modi University?
faqs.answer: For admission to the MBA programme at KK Modi University, the aspirant must fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria. Thus, only the aspirants who have passed graduation are eligible for admission. The selection criteria for the course are KKMU Admission Test or personal interview/MAT/CAT/XAT/CMAT/ATMA/NMAT. Students are advised to keep the documents ready for the last educational qualification. For more details, students can visit the official website.

faqs.question: Is MBA course available at KK Modi University?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA course is available at  KK Modi University.  KK Modi University offers MBA courses at the PG level. To be eligible for the award of the degree, candidates shall complete the course in a maximum period of two years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass graduation to apply for an MBA course in this university.
